rulings.Case Title: THEODORE C. LOWENBERG VS. WEIJIE YIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 4, 2017, line 11. PLAINTIFF THEODORE LOWENBERG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035. =(501/REQ)
